title: Compiler resolve and codegen waves (enum, generics, Capabilities)
body:
Wave 1–2 compiler gates aligned with remaining_corelib_blockers + corelib_ansi_codegen_green + compiler_test_green_plan.

## Landed (compiler @ `be6e171` working tree)

- **Resolve:** `resolve_enum_path` delegates to `resolve_type_path`; `collapse_homonymous_module_segment` in [`module_index.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_analysis/src/projects/assembly/module_index.rs); `scoped_call_kinds` + `call_kind_at` in [`context.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_analysis/src/types/context/context.rs); foreign sig placeholder params preserve arity
- **Codegen:** `seed_struct_definitions` for dependency units; Capabilities/Terminal link-plan hardening; `ConsoleAnsiEscapeTests` **8/8** pass
- **CLI:** `SemanticDiagnosticsError` Display recursion fixed

## Remaining

- `Ansi.Sgr` scoped expr-type miss (`ConsoleAnsiStyleChainTests` / `sgr_builder_fg_basic_golden`)
- Redundant `sextend` on i64 const (FormatMarkdown/Attributes/Scan targets)
- Result match + generic concurrency paths; expand slow-feature CLIF gates

## Exit

`just compiler` green; spine typecheck gates pass; majority of matrix analysis/codegen failures cleared.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`

subtasks.text: Expand CLIF gates for newly fixed entrypoints
